reviews.review_description:
Hello. I’m very happy with the app. I sincerely recommend it. I’d like you to fix something that I’m not sure only happens to me: for the past couple of weeks, I haven’t been able to download songs — the app freezes and then closes. It’s not a storage space issue on my device, and I have the latest version of the app installed. Thank you very much!

UPDATED:
It's already solved. It seems it was a Wi-Fi issue.
Thanks for your support via email.

developer_response.body:
Hi Soyjam, I am glad to hear you are enjoying Shadow BoXR!

I am sorry however to hear that you are running into issues with downloading songs! If you could reach out to me at 3PupperStudios@gmail.com I would love to hear more about this issue so that I can make sure to resolve it for you as quickly as possible!

reviews.review_description: I just purchased and I have questions for the developer. What's the best way to communicate with you?

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for your support! You are welcome to contact me via email at 3PupperStudios@gmail.com, or by joining my official channel here: https://discord.gg/R3HQb9wXNY

reviews.review_description: Very happy! But how can I add my custom background?

developer_response.body:
Hi Mishomalnar!
I'm glad you are enjoying Shadow BoXR!
You can add a custom background by adding it to your device's Downloads and then selecting Custom Content in game, and Custom Environments and selecting the + symbol in the top right corner of the menu.
A simple tutorial is available on youtube here https://youtu.be/0-HgzQ0Sghs

reviews.review_description: I like this game my main source of excercise vr. Sadly past update broke some of my downloaded custom songs. Toss a coin to your witcher both versions make it so you can't finish after the first set when you change stance there are no more targets that come at you. So for 3 min no targets anymore

developer_response.body:
*** Update 07/19/2025 ***
I just released a hotfix version 0.2.5.5 that should fix some songs not creating targets after changing stances! Please feel free to reach out to me if you have any other questions, concerns or feature requests in the future!
************

Hi Ddraig1985,

Sorry for the delayed response! I’m in the middle of moving but as soon as I can get my computer up and running again I will absolutely try to get this issue fixed for you! If you’d be willing to reach out to me at 3pupperstudios@gmail.com I’d love to get a little more information from you so I can expedite fixing the issue!

reviews.review_description:
The window for the hit to count doesn't feel right to me compared to the visual. Watching my fist go through target with "too slow" repeatedly feels really bad. I tried tinkering with what settings there are in the menu but nothing felt good to me. At minimum it should still break the target even if it counts as "too slow" for scoring.

It actually feels so bad from a feedback perspective having the glove go through the marker without registering that I don't have any motivation to keep playing.

developer_response.body:
Hi KyojinJaeger,
I am really sorry to hear you are not enjoying your experience with Shadow BoXR. I appreciate your support and would love to try to make this right for you however I can. I have tried to make sure the user feedback and timings feel as good as possible but am always looking to improve. I will revisit that logic and see if I cant make this a better experience for you. In the meantime, feel free to reach out to me at 3PupperStudios@gmail.com if you would like I would love to try to ensure that this issue gets fixed for you.

That said, Shadow BoXR does vary from many of the other available games because it does require you to punch the targets in order to hit them successfully similar to "Force Mode" in Synth Riders. Currently the default is set to the minimum strike speed, I will look into reducing the minimum further or adding an option that does not require force to see if that helps the issue.

reviews.review_description: It’s almost a perfect game, I just wished that it was possible to use only hand tracking or glove tracking.

developer_response.body:
Hi X.player1!
I'm so glad to hear you are enjoying Shadow BoXR!
Hand tracking is actually a feature I really want to implement. I'll bump it up to high priority and see if I can get it implemented for the next update!

reviews.review_title: Great program great workout. Just died
reviews.review_description:
So I use this 3 times a day to workout. Great program.   On my whoop I'm averaging 600-700 calories burn per 45min session on some of the highest settings.  This puts this near the top workout on Quest for sure.  

I have a lot of things I'd love to change or be able to adjust. But as is, it's been one of the best workouts and I have almost 140 different fitness programs.  Short of all out boxing in golden gloves or thrill of the fight, this tops the calories per minute burn.
This game is fantastic. I’ve just found that the custom colors don’t seem to work. Otherwise, this seems like the best boxing game on Quest.

developer_response.body:
**** Update 05/11/2025 ****
Hi again! I found the bug causing custom colors to not work and was able to create a patch to fix it! I just released version 0.2.5.4 with a hotfix to fix the problem! Please feel free to reach out to me at 3PupperStudios@gmail.com or join my discord server at https://discord.gg/fhjVDPR7pQ if you have any other issues or questions!

Hi Aaron!
I'm so glad to hear you are enjoying Shadow BoXR!
I was not aware of the issue with the custom colors! I will look into the issue immediately and try to release a hotfix as soon as I can!

reviews.review_description: It's a great fitness app, using own music is great. I would love to see more sync beats with the targets, maybe I didn't find it yet, where I can set the speed of objects and targets to adjust to bpm of the song. For the real dynamic vibe some kind of effect like in pistol whip where the whole scene resonates with beats of the songs. Also if possible better visuals for targets and which hand should hit which target. I know it's only two colors but after a while if I focus on movement, breathing and music I miss the color-hand side. So adding some visuals like a string (arrow, lighting) pointing from the target to the correct hand as an option (would start transparent and progressively appearing pointing to the correct hand. Walls could also be more interesting somehow, they all same and there is a lot of space to display some visuals (progress till end, prepare to change feet) these are only small things. Need to test passthrough on my quest 3 next

developer_response.body:
Hi coudys!
I'm glad to hear you're enjoying Shadow BoXR!
That is a lot of great feedback and a lot of great ideas I'll add them to my development roadmap! If you would be willing to email me at 3PupperStudios@gmail.com, I would love to talk to you more about them and flesh the ideas out more so I can integrate them for you!

reviews.review_description: Devs listened and fixed my issue with songs made it impossible to play, now I can add my own songs. In the future I hope there is multiplayer for royalty free songs like supernatural and also some knee strikes like in Les mills. Also a leaderboard!! But this is my go to game along with Powerbeats vr. This game has the potential to be the best training for boxing.

This is my favourite workout on my meta quest 3. Challenging levels with your own music. The only "problem" I'm having is, I can't mute the sounds of my punches, I have tried to pull the slider to zero percent but still can hear it, when I go back to settings the slider is on the far left (zero percent),but it shows a hundred percent. Hopefully it's going to be fixed,but it's not a deal breaker. Just bought the steam version as well to support the developers. Thank you for this great workout game!

developer_response.body:
Hi JM985, I'm so glad to hear that you are enjoying Shadow BoXR so much!
thank you so much for your support and for bringing this bug to my attention! I will look into the problem and see if I cant fix it in the next update!

reviews.review_description: For the price you pay, it's a crime not to get it. You have as much customisation as it comes. The dev is very responsive and whenever you have an idea and/or a question he always goes out of his way to assist you. 10/10 would buy again
I am new to the VR world. Thought I could use a boxing game to workout. I am very tired after using it. This is exactas what I wanted. Comes at you very fast. Great job

I really want to like this but doing 5-6 of the same punch off the same arm and over and over is bit silly and unrealistic. I got fed up and quit the workout. Went to X-Fitness for my cardio boxing instead. Shadowboxing is about natural flow and combos. Slipping left and the next target is a straight right?! If the dev is not a boxer then I totally understand this, but please consult a boxer. The targets are coming in against the bodies natural movements and it's very frustrating. If you slip left then you are loaded up naturally for a left handed punch.

developer_response.body:
*** Update 03/25/2025 ***
Hi eye_rollz, I wanted to take a minute to thank you. I couldnt stop thinking about your review and trying to figure out how you could have run into the issue you did. Because of that, I did a deep dive into my code and found a bug that caused exactly what you described! So thank you so much for bringing the bug to my attention! I took the time to completely re-write the logic for the sequencing and just released version 0.2.5.1 which should completely resolve the issue you described! Thank you again.
******

*** Update 01/20/2025 ***
With the update 0.2.4, the sequencing of the choreography has been improved with additional protections to ensure a smoother and more natural experience! I hope you have a chance to give Shadow BoXR another try!
******

I am so sorry to hear that you did not enjoy your experience with Shadow BoXR. I have tried to ensure a smooth and realistic shadow boxing experience with the built in and custom songs. It sounds to me like something not right has occurred with your experience as no more than 3 targets should appear on the same side and directional strikes like hooks and uppercuts are always followed by the opposing side. If you would be willing to reach out to me at 3PupperStudios@gmail.com I would love to try to resolve the issue you are running into or offer you a full refund if you are still unhappy because I absolutely agree. after every hook or uppercut Shadow BoXR is designed to switch to the other hand for a more natural movement!

I am also active on Reddit under the username u/Fuzzinator12 or if youd prefer you can join our discord channel  https://discord.com/invite/4MrVBC7w and I'd love to work with you to get this fixed

reviews.review_description:
I own many boxing and rhythm games and I keep coming back to this one!  

From a very attentive developer to a large active community, this game is a winner!

And bonus points for the game recognizing all my mp3 songs already on my quest without having to manually transfer them over to a custom folder :)

This game gave me my life back. I was a boxer for several years until a severe back injury put me out. I thought I'd never be able to get back into, but this game - alongside months of physical therapy - gave me hope and allowed me to pace myself during my recovery. It's just outstanding and a daily part of my morning routine that I greatly look forward to. I just want the creator to know that this labor of love has made a huge difference for me and is enormous amounts of fun. Thank you so much!

developer_response.body: Hi QHOOPS! I cannot express how deeply touched I am to hear that I was able to assist you in your recovery! Thank you so much for letting letting me know. I am honored that Shadow BoXR has become a part of your daily routine and I am so glad that you are enjoying it! Thank you for taking the time to let me know because truly makes it all worth it!

reviews.review_description: Loving this game thus far and particularly love the ability to have a custom playlist of songs. Would love to see a feature though to skip a song during a workout - especially when you have a longer playlist would be nice to skip songs.

developer_response.body:
Hi Chapinprodigy! I'm so glad to hear you are enjoying Shadow BoXR!
Adding an option to skip songs is a great idea! I will add it to my roadmap for future updates!

reviews.review_title: The best fitness game for music nerds
reviews.review_description:
I've played quite a few fitness music rhythm games and after a while, I get bored with the music and decide I'd rather just play a game where I don't think about working out.

With this game, you can convert your own mp3s by putting them in the downloads folder of the quest. You'll probably have to mess around with the difficulty settings to find the appropriate one depending on the song, but I couldn't have imagined being able to box and dodge to Lifter Puller and Illuminati Hotties before. Now I can just add mp3s from my own collection.

I completely lost track of time punching and dodging to my favorite songs.

And if you don't want to add your mp3s, adding custom content is ridiculously easy. With something like Synth Riders, you have to download the files, hook up your Quest, and transfer the files over (At least, that's what I had to do). With Shadow BoXR, you just go to the custom content section and you can scroll through tons of custom content or search for it.

For those that are picky about music, this is easily the best choice for a fitness app.

reviews.review_title: The workout ive been looking for!
reviews.review_description: While the UI may be a bit simple, the gameplay more than makes up for it. Finally a fast loading rythym boxing game that just works and has built in community song search and playlists. Really impressed with how the walls are used to make you dodge like youre dodging punches. Now one of the staples of my daily workout routine!
Great game, great MR integration and lots of custom songs

developer_response.body:
Hi R0binG00dfell0,
I'm thank you for the great review! I'm, glad you're enjoying the MR integration and huge library of custom songs!
